title: sorbus aucuparia var. americana
intro: Sorbus aucuparia var. americana, also known as American mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of American mountain ash include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Sorbus aucuparia var. americana include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its bark, leaves, and berries, which can be used to treat various ailments.
